items.title: AI / ML / DL / Gen AI nesting (conceptual)
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  ai["Artificial Intelligence"]
  ml["Machine Learning"]
  dl["Deep Learning"]
  disc["Discriminative ML"]
  gen["Generative AI / Generative ML"]
  ai --> ml
  ml --> disc
  ml --> gen
  dl --> disc
  dl --> gen
  gen --> note1["Primary output: new samples"]
items.caption: Gen AI is a capability branch under ML, usually implemented with deep learning today—not a separate layer above DL.

items.title: Predict vs generate at inference
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  x["Input x"] --> dpath["Discriminative head"]
  dpath --> y["Label or score y"]
  ctx["Context or prompt"] --> gpath["Generative model"]
  gpath --> samp["Sample loop"]
  samp --> xnew["New output x-prime"]
items.caption: Discriminative deployment maps input to a fixed decision; generative deployment iteratively samples new content.
